steps.title: Set up conversion
steps.content:
Set up the conversion:
$$ 10.7 \frac{\text{m}}{\text{s}^2} \times \frac{1 \text{ mile}}{1609 \text{ m}} \times \left(\frac{60 \text{ s}}{1 \text{ min}}\right)^2 $$
Simplify to:
$$ = 10.7 \times \frac{3600}{1609} \frac{\text{mile}}{\text{min}^2} $$

steps.title: Compute and match choice
steps.content:
Compute the value:
$$ \frac{10.7 \times 3600}{1609} \approx 23.94 $$
Rounded to the nearest tenth gives $23.9$ miles per minute squared.
That matches the correct answer - B is correct.
